_README.format: UID (uppercase hex, no spaces) → user record

fields.name: Must match exactly what is written on card Block 4 (case-insensitive compare)
fields.gender: Single char: M or F (case-insensitive compare)
fields.secret_code: Exactly 4 ASCII digits e.g. '1234' — must match card Block 5 bytes 1-4

how_to_write_card.tool: Use mfrc522_card_writer.py (see below) OR MIFARE Classic Tool Android app
how_to_write_card.block4: Name padded to 16 bytes with spaces e.g. 'Mridul          '
how_to_write_card.block5: Gender byte + 4 code bytes + 11 null bytes e.g. 'M1234\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00'
how_to_write_card.key_A: FF FF FF FF FF FF (default, do not change for demo)
